title: Permission precheck
verified_behaviors: Binds RP00.P02.M03.S05 to Hermes Validation Permission precheck
Accepts only S04 allow_metadata_only Hermes Validation Matter trace precheck results
Requires and satisfies permission_decision_ref for metadata-only permission precheck
Allows Matter-scoped and firm-level control-plane metadata permission references

Rejects missing S04 result, wrong entrypoint, wrong S04 marker, denied Matter trace, missing permission ref, permission bypass, runtime permission engine, AuthZ evaluator, runtime route, service execution, product write, tenant lifecycle mutation, Hermes execution/evidence, requirement trace bypass, human approval bypass, Hermes gate bypass, Claude review bypass, real-data, and unknown permission claims fail-closed
Carries validation context ids, TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, acceptance gates, M00 refs, permission_decision_ref, and audit_event_ref
Does not create runtime routes or execute service logic
Does not mutate tenant lifecycle state
Does not run Hermes validation or create Hermes evidence as product runtime behavior
Does not evaluate runtime permissions, call AuthZ, or run a permission engine
Does not replace human approval, H00, or C00
Does not use real data or write product state
Hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S06 Audit hint precheck
human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: No human approval is required for this deterministic synthetic metadata-only control-plane subphase; explicit next boundary is RP00.P02.M03.S06 Audit hint precheck.
